data.name: Fertility Clinic
data.detailed_description:
Hong Kong, it's been a while since I've been here. I grimace at the mental image of my ex-husband, who managed to charm his way into my life for five years. I had been planning on starting a family with my ex, but now, I'm 36. Been able to get over 200 successful pregnancies in women over 40. The doctor had mentions he had a private facility on a nearby island... Special fertility clinic.

  • Visual novel game, 2-4 hours

  • Scenes 14

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windowns 2000, Windows XP, Windows Vista
  • 處理器: any
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: any
  • DirectX: 版本：8.1
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.0 Cheetah
  • 處理器: any
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: any
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux kernel 2.2.12 / 2.2.14 / 2.2.19
  • 處理器: any
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: any
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: any
